question.text: Managing retirement income when the corpus proves inadequate can include all of the following strategies EXCEPT:

answer.text: Pursuing a second career or part-time employment
Taking high-risk speculative investments to quickly grow the corpus
Considering a reverse mortgage on the primary residence

explanation.text: **The Logic:** High-risk speculative investments are extremely dangerous for retirees with an already inadequate corpus. A loss would further deplete limited resources with no time to recover. **The Trap:** All other options are legitimate strategies recommended in the NISM XVII workbook for managing retirement income shortfalls. **Cross-Exam Context:** Income gap management strategies are core to Series XVII and connect to risk management principles in Series X-A. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Never recommend speculative investments to bridge an income gap in retirement. Instead, focus on expense reduction, additional income sources, and asset monetization strategies.
